title: Break-even analysis
summary: 9609 AS — break-even chart, formula, margin of safety, and limitations.

simpleExplanation.title: Where profit starts
simpleExplanation.summary: Break-even is where total revenue equals total cost. Contribution per unit determines how many sales cover fixed costs.
steps: BE output = fixed costs / contribution per unit.
Chart: TR and TC lines cross at BE.
Margin of safety = actual − BE output.
Assumes fixed price and costs linear.

sections.content: **Break-even** (5.4.4) is core **9609 calculation**. Show **formula, chart, and margin of safety** together.
